Bold Manifesto / AI consulting for women leaders

SHE HAS BEEN IN THE MACHINE. NOW SHE TEACHES LEADERS HOW TO MOVE IT.

This is not theory dressed up as confidence. This is 25 years of enterprise technology, governance, and lived executive pressure.

Start the conversation

Credentials are receipts

Former CTO at Microsoft; Chief of Staff to the CEO at Intel; former DoD Digital Logic Designer; Independent Director at IDEX Corporation (NYSE); Co-Founding Advisor to TechArena.ai; host of the ROAR podcast.

Receipts matter

$1B+ platforms. Top 50 Black Business Women in the U.S. Public company board service. Enterprise scale. Defense systems. Founder ecosystems. ROAR.

The point

Lakecia’s work is not to impress the room with acronyms. It is to make sure women leaders are not cornered by them.

Ready for the next room?

Bring the pressure, the ambition, and the open questions. Lakecia will help you turn them into a leadership position.

Contact
Lakecia Gunter · AI consulting for women leaders · ROAR-informed leadership.
